top_signals.title: Greens consider helping Labour’s Andy Burnham in Makerfield by-election
top_signals.summary: Some in Zack Polanski’s party are wary of being blamed for splitting progressive vote in north-west constituency
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Euan Blair’s Multiverse ‘needs improvement’, Ofsted finds
top_signals.summary: Education regulator found the start-up was falling short in four out of the five areas assessed
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Gracias’ Valor Stands to Pocket Billions From SpaceX IPO
top_signals.summary: Antonio Gracias, the founder of Valor Equity Partners and a longtime Elon Musk ally, controls a 4% economic stake in SpaceX through various funds, the second-largest position disclosed after Musk himself that will earn the investor and his firm a giant windfall.
